title: TaskManifest Directory in Hadoop MapReduce
description: The 'lib/output/committer/manifest/files' directory in Hadoop MapReduce contains Java classes crucial for managing task manifests. The 'TaskManifest' class encapsulates metadata about files created by a task attempt, including job and task identifiers, file locations, and sizes. It extends 'AbstractManifestData' for data handling and validation, and uses Jackson for JSON serialization. 'DirEntry' and 'FileEntry' classes represent directory and file entries respectively, while 'EntryStatus' enum defines entry types. 'DiagnosticKeys' provides constants for diagnostic information. These components collaborate to ensure accurate tracking and management of task outputs, facilitating efficient job commit and recovery in Hadoop MapReduce.
